:::{#exm-marginal-rd}

#### Estimated causal marginal risk difference

Continuing from @exm-marginal-risks,
the causal marginal risk difference estimate is:

```{r}
#| label: wcgs-causal-marginal-rd
rd_hat <- pi1_hat - pi0_hat
```

$$
\ba
\widehat{\text{Causal Marginal RD}}
&= \hat\pi_1 - \hat\pi_0
\\
&= `r round(pi1_hat, 3)` - `r round(pi0_hat, 3)`
\\
&= `r round(rd_hat, 3)`
\ea
$$

:::
